name: sharepoint
description: Access and manage SharePoint sites, document libraries, and files

envVars.name: MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Microsoft Azure App Client ID (shared with Outlook/Teams)

tools.name: List SharePoint Sites
tools.description: List all SharePoint sites the user has access to

tools.name: Get Site Details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific SharePoint site

tools.name: List Files
tools.description: List files and folders in a SharePoint document library

tools.name: Get File
tools.description: Get file metadata and content from SharePoint

tools.name: Upload File
tools.description: Upload a file to a SharePoint document library

prompts.title: Search documents
prompts.prompt: Search for documents in SharePoint sites and summarize their content.

prompts.title: List recent files
prompts.prompt: Show me the most recently modified files across all SharePoint sites I have access to.

prompts.title: Organize documents
prompts.prompt: Help me organize and categorize documents in a SharePoint library.
